description.value: Aura moderate conjuration and enchantment; CL 8th; Slot armor; Price 4,840 gp; Weight 40 lbs. DESCRIPTION This blue-black +1 defiant chainmail has a metal badge depicting a three-dagger symbol fused to it. Each of these suits of armor is crafted with a particular type of foe in mind for the defiant property, as appropriate for the vengeance the original crafter sought. Once per day, the wearer can use charm person (lasting 1 hour) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells charm person, summon monster I; Price 2,570 gp
